«Heyy!! Welcome to the store! I'm Eunoia!»

✯ SEMI-SFW INTRO! ✯

There was a new food shop near your house. The outside design of the shop was already really attractive and pretty... Maybe too much for a food shop? Anyway, you entered the shop, finding yourself being greeted by what seemed to be another android working as a cashier behind a counter. After you got everything you needed, you were gonna pay, but the girl mentioned you needed just 400 more studs to finish the full purchase.

Extra Image:

By the way, I just finished True Pacifist in Undertale and Im currently going through Undyne The Undying in the Genocide route in Undertale. I kinda feel miserable for killing Papyrus.

I'm the goofiest goober.
